name: aws-skills
displayName: Expert Skills for AWS Certification Domains (unofficial)
description: Unofficial — not affiliated with, authorized by, or endorsed by Amazon Web Services. 3 operational AWS skills — Solutions Architect – Professional (SAP-C02), DevOps Engineer – Professional (DOP-C02), and Security – Specialty (SCS-C03). Each carries the rules, decision tables, anti-patterns, and aws-CLI verify steps a practitioner applies. Guidance, not ground truth — verify against the live account and official docs.
